STT 1, 107+ [Dream rituals][via cams/gkab]

oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

x [...]

(o 1') ... [...]

o 2'2'

x [...]

(o 2') ... [...]

o 3'3'

ša₂ ⸢AN?⸣ [...] x [...]

(o 3') Of ... [...].

o 4'4'

EN₂ d[e₂-a ...] x ⸢AN⸣ u ⸢KIti₃ ba⸣-[nu-u ...]

(o 4') Incantation: [O Ea, ...] ... of heaven and earth, creator of [...],

o 5'5'

mu-⸢uṣ⸣-[ṣi-ru ...] ⸢u₂-sa-ti pa-ri-is EŠ.BAR⸣a ša₂ DINGIR-[MEŠ ...]

(o 5') Designer of [..., ...] of help, he who decides the verdicts concerning the gods [...].

o 6'6'

MAŠ₂.[GE₆ ... a]-⸢mu-ru⸣ pal-⸢ḫa-ku ad⸣-ra-ku-ma šu-ta-⸢du-ra⸣-[ku]

(o 6') (On account of) the dream [I] saw [...], I am frightened, I am afraid and I am constantly terrified.

o 7'7'

⸢dam⸣-[qat ...]-ša₂!(A) ⸢ina⸣ muḫ-ḫi-ia ⸢lik?-šu?-ud?⸣-ma kur-ba-an-ni

(o 7') (If my dream) is good, (then say:) "May its [...] reach me," (otherwise say:) "May it (= the evil dream) be cancelled in water (like) a lump of earth that [I] throw [into water] in front of you, and dissolve." Incantation formula.

Reverse
r 1r 1

ina IGI-⸢ka⸣ [ana A-MEŠ ad]-⸢du⸣-u ina A-MEŠ lip-⸢pa-sis⸣ u liḫ₄-ḫar-<miṭ> ⸢TU₆⸣ EN₂!(EN)

r 22

KA.INIM.[MA MAŠ₂].⸢GE₆⸣ [ḪUL]ti₃ BUR₂ri KID₃.⸢KID₃-BI⸣ kur-ba-an-ni

(r 2) Incantation to undo a bad dream. Its ritual procedures: You take a lump of waste land, recite [the incantation] over it [n] times (and) throw it in water. [For] the undoing of dreams.

r 33

ba-li-[ti] TI!(AN)qe₂ [EN₂ n]-⸢TA.AM₃⸣ ana UGU ŠIDnu ina A-MEŠ ŠUBdi

r 44

MAŠ₂.⸢GE₆⸣-MEŠ [ana] ⸢pa?-ša₂?⸣-a-ri

r 55

* ⸢NA MAŠ₂.GE₆⸣ par₂-⸢da⸣-[a-ti ...]

(r 5) (If) a man [...] frightening dreams [...], to undo [...] and [...].

r 66

BUR₂ri u₃!(ŠU₂.LU) [...]

r 77

NUMUN u₂ḪAB u₂[...]

(r 7) Seeds of būšānu-plant, [...]-plant [...]

r 88

[...] ⸢NUMUN⸣ giš⸢ŠINIG⸣ [...]

(r 8) [...] seeds of tamarisk [...]
